channel_name: Coach Erik Schjolberg - The Science of Better Golf
description:
Welcome to the official YouTube channel of EJS Golf, hosted by me, Coach Erik Schjolberg, top rated golf coach in the golf mecca of Scottsdale, AZ. With over 25 years of experience as a Professional Golf Coach, I’ve had the privilege to work with PGA Tour Players, college athletes, high-level developing juniors, and golf enthusiasts who are willing to commit to progress and weekend warriors that want to get better for that day or tournament.

Are you tired of hitting fat golf shots, topping, not having the shaft lean you want, etc.?   There are root causes to these that have to be fixed to become the ball striking machine anyone can become.   Improve your game from the very first lesson.  Every golfer should get better from their very first lesson. My feedback-driven approach to practice, demanding only 15 minutes of commitment per day, guarantees results.

Coach Erik Schjolberg
